What I Do

Services

Building products that actually deliver results.

SEO & Growth

Rank on Google + get cited by AI (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini). Every project comes with technical SEO, schema markup, and AI citation optimization.

  • AI Platform Optimization

Web Development

Fast, modern websites using Next.js, Astro, and Tailwind CSS. Performance-first architecture.

  • Next.js & Astro
  • Tailwind CSS
  • Performance 90+

AI Automation

Save 10+ hours/week with OpenAI and Claude workflows. Automation that actually works.

  • OpenAI Integration

Telegram Bots

Custom bots with payments, subscriptions, and AI. Turn-key solutions for creators and SaaS.

  • AI Integration
